skills.name: heyeddi-design
skills.description: End-to-end UI design for HeyEddi stack (PrimeVue, DESIGN.md, semantic tokens — OpenProps on scaffold default). Use when the user wants to design, explore, critique, or improve existing frontend — e.g. "enterprise view", "critique the login page", "this UI looks bad", "settings page". skills.name: heyeddi-intake
